mapper.select: SELECT * FROM yy_drug_alias WHERE platform_code = #{platformCode} AND platform_sku_id = #{skuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yy_drug_alias (drug_id, platform_code, platform_product_name, platform_manufacturer, platform_specification, platform_sku_id, confidence, match_method, last_verified_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{drugId}, #{platformCode}, #{platformProductName}, #{platformManufacturer}, #{platformSpecification}, #{platformSkuId}, #{confidence}, #{matchMethod}, NOW(), #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
